result.stdout:
Description:
  GraphQL Code Generation Tool

Usage:
  Agoda.GrapqhlGen [options]

Options:
  --schema-url <schema-url> (REQUIRED)                               URL of the GraphQL schema
  --input-path <input-path> (REQUIRED)                               Path to the directory containing .graphql files
  --output-path <output-path> (REQUIRED)                             Path where generated files will be saved
  --namespace <namespace>                                            Base namespace for generated code [default: Generated]
  --headers <headers>                                                Headers to include in the schema request (format: 'Key: Value')
  --template <template>                                              Template to use for code generation [default: typescript]
  --model-file <model-file>                                          Name of the generated models file [default: Models.cs]
  --log-level <Critical|Debug|Error|Information|None|Trace|Warning>  Set the logging level (Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical) [default: Information]
  --version                                                          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                     Show help and usage information

  --headers <headers>                                                Headers to include in the schema request (format: 'Key: Value')
  --template <template>                                              Template to use for code generation [default: typescript]
  --model-file <model-file>                                          Name of the generated models file [default: Models.cs]
